Container.Name: wodGod
Container.Overview: wodGod is a stateful CrossFit programming engine for up to 10 athletes. It generates personalized workouts via an LLM, stores training history in PostgreSQL, and enforces programming rules and safety constraints. The app automatically creates the database and schema on first startup.
Container.Description: wodGod - AI-powered CrossFit programming engine. Generates personalized workouts using LLM, tracks training history, and enforces programming rules. Requires an external PostgreSQL instance and an Ollama (or OpenAI-compatible) LLM server. Auto-creates the database and schema on startup.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the wodGod web interface

Config.Name: Postgres Host
Config.Description: IP address or hostname of your PostgreSQL server.

Config.Name: Postgres Port
Config.Description: Port your PostgreSQL server is listening on.

Config.Name: Postgres Database
Config.Description: Database name. Will be created automatically if it doesn't exist.

Config.Name: Postgres User
Config.Description: PostgreSQL username. Must have permission to create databases (or the target DB must already exist).

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for JWT token signing. Change this to a random string!

Config.Name: JWT Expiry (hours)
Config.Description: How many hours before login tokens expire.

Config.Name: LLM Base URL
Config.Description: URL of your Ollama or OpenAI-compatible LLM server.

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: Model name to use for workout generation (e.g. llama3, mistral, etc.)

Config.Name: LLM API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI-compatible providers. Leave blank for Ollama.

Config.Name: Claude API Key
Config.Description: Anthropic API key for Claude. Leave blank to disable Claude as an option. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/

Config.Name: Claude Model
Config.Description: Claude model to use (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-20250514, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001).
